species_details: Oleaginous green microalga cultivated in Kuhl medium, exponential phase cells re-inoculated at 0.5 g/L
technique: RNA-seq · BGISEQ-500 · paired-end · reference-based transcriptome profiling
induction_details: 200 mM NaCl treatment; samples collected at 0 h vs 6 h with three biological replicates
